title: Multi-Platform Dictionary Sidebar for Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a sidebar that lets me access dictionaries from Salesforce, Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau, so that I can browse data structures across all connected platforms in one place.
description:
Create a unified sidebar navigation for accessing dictionaries from multiple platforms. Metrics are universal across all platforms — a metric can be expressed in multiple systems.

### Sidebar Sources
- Salesforce Dictionary (existing)
- Snowflake Dictionary (database → schema → table → fields)
- HubSpot Dictionary
- Tableau (dashboards and reports with drill-in capability)

### Snowflake Implementation
- Dynamic dropdowns: Instance → Database → Schema
- DataTables list of tables per schema
- Auto-refresh from Snowflake API if no tables found
- Reverse relationship lookup: table_id derives schema, database, instance
- Team-scoped access via team_id validation
- Auto-fetch fields from Snowflake API if missing locally

### HubSpot
- Added as a dictionary option on the frontend, awaiting further processing guidance
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar allows switching between Salesforce, Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau dictionaries
Snowflake dictionary shows cascading dropdowns: Instance → Database → Schema → Tables
Table fields are loaded dynamically with auto-fetch from Snowflake if missing
HubSpot dictionary is accessible from the sidebar
All data is scoped to the current team
ux_changes: Multi-platform dictionary sidebar with Salesforce, Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau options. Cascading dropdowns for Snowflake navigation.
middleware_changes: Snowflake API integration for database/schema/table/field retrieval. Reverse relationship lookup. Auto-refresh logic.
data_model_changes: Extended dictionary data model to support Snowflake and HubSpot tables and fields.
api_changes: Snowflake API calls for database, schema, table, and field metadata retrieval.
implementation_notes: Snowflake dictionary uses cascading AJAX calls for database → schema → table navigation. If no tables or fields found locally, a one-time background fetch from the Snowflake API is triggered. Team-scoped access is enforced via team_id validation.
comment_summary: Developer implemented Snowflake dictionary with cascading dropdowns, auto-refresh, and reverse relationship lookup. Added HubSpot as a dictionary option. Awaiting feedback on further processing.
